_doc: Reconnaissance config for ScaNavi. Repo: https://github.com/michielinksee/VINOX

health._note: ScaNavi is mobile-first (Expo). Web preview URLs go here as they exist. Production mobile build is monitored via Google Play Console / App Store separately.
health._fail_open_note: Mobile-first product. Some web preview URLs may not be live yet. Treat 4xx/5xx as warning, not critical, until web product surface stabilizes.

snapshot._note: Tier B-beta: Playwright snapshot of chat screen

agent_voice_probe._note: Tier B-beta: probe chat API with: 辛口の重いの / 華やかで甘い / 寿司に合う / どぶろくありますか / ありえない銘柄名

warning: health.url returns 4xx (treat as warning given fail_open)
